overview: A clean and modern Client Management App for digital agencies — manage clients, projects, tasks, and payments all in one place with a card-based dashboard UI.
features: Client management with full CRUD (name, email, phone, business)
Project tracking with status badges (Pending, In Progress, Completed)
Task checklists per project with completion toggle
Payment tracking with auto-calculated remaining amount
Notes and file/link attachments per project
Dashboard with real-time metrics: clients, active projects, earnings
